register.note: Forced 0 — no specimen: hero.png opens with title+prose+placard+rail on bare cream, where even document-first ciechanowski-watch/00 lands its render in the opening viewport.
Forced 0 — no hero to carry the cut; seeing-theory-regression/01 shows residual squares (the mechanism) in its first frame while here the threshold only appears far below the fold.

The spine graphic self-labels (mono title, in-canvas 'your rule' tag on the boundary, axis ticks, 70% readout) at parity with distill-momentum/02, short of 4 only because the readout '70%' is unlabelled.

Restrained but focal hierarchy fails — see-viewport's top ~60% is repeated masthead/placard/rail with the scatter pushed ~640px down and clipped, where ciechanowski-watch/02 lets one render own the frame.

StoryStepper beats and the Break-it failure loop are explanatory and learner-controlled (clears intent), but nothing shows motion carrying explanation the way 3b1b-gradient-descent/02 does, and no earned on-load specimen motion exists.

Semantic grammar holds without dilution — break-viewport keeps pink=error/bias, blue=prediction, orange=truth distinct (no all-red drain), and prose Terms pair hue+underline+weight, matching r2d3-trees/00's discipline.

hero.note: A hero would need a wide, ambient portrait of the threshold-cut scatter in truth/prediction hues above the masthead, with one explanatory on-load motion (the rule line easing into its cut).

assessment.note: The transfer item (transfer-hiring) is a third multiple-choice question with options, not an interaction or open prompt; the genuine interaction (break-bias) is an earlier experiment-task, not the transfer.

blocking: Add the specimen hero specified in DESIGN.md so the threshold-cut scatter (truth/prediction hues, no chrome) is visible in the opening viewport before the rail — this is the journey's first node and currently has the weakest opening in the cluster (§1d).
Compress the masthead/placard/rail stack so the See-it scatter clears the fold at 1440x900 instead of starting ~640px down.
Make the transfer item (transfer-hiring) an interaction or open prompt rather than a third MCQ.
verdict.summary: Interior acts match the bar (annotation 3, colour 3) but the title-led, specimen-less doorway forces two delight dims to 0 and a chrome-heavy atmosphere 2 — the journey's first node reads as the weakest opening, does not clear register 3.
